title: Moderation update
body: Abuse queue triage complete. Actioned 2 high-severity cases: spam_wave_42 was banned for phishing spam across multiple channels, and toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. Reviewed a high-severity report against core_maintainer and applied no sanction because it was a brigaded false positive; the report was closed after review. No action was taken on lower-severity items in this pass.
